[File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/services/account_service.go -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: AccountBalance()] Can an unprivileged external user supply a `request.BlockIdentifier` with only `Index` set (no `Hash`) to force `RetrieveBlock` to call `FindByIndex`, selecting a block whose `ConsensusEndNanos` falls between a fee-schedule-update transaction and its application, causing `RetrieveBalanceAtBlock` to compute balances under the wrong fee schedule?
